why_this_action.reasoning: Skiln is a live Claude-focused directory with an explicit submit surface and an audience already looking for Claude Code workflows, skills, agents, and related tooling. Direct curator outreach is executable now and better matched to the current distribution repair mandate than another owned-content or Reddit iteration.

why_this_action.replacement_condition: If no reply, listing, or measurable Codeberg delta appears by the review window, treat this target as exhausted and replace it with a different untouched curator/domain lane rather than resending the same pitch.
